text:
Varvard [University] (, Bābādo-dai) is an educational institution in which Curly, a Dark Continent Expedition Team member, is a professor. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Sequentially after Ging bests Curly in a ancient language contest on Kappe, Pekotero tells Ging that Curly is a professor at Varvard. 

Trivia

Varvard's name is probably derived from Harvard University (, Hābādo Daigaku).
